scripts.text:
USE P21Play;
SET NOCOUNT ON;
DECLARE @ShipmentFileId uniqueidentifier = 'f5c975af-1d81-5d36-9ff8-244fd38c9fc5';
DECLARE @ContainerReceiptsHdrUid int = 682;
DECLARE @VesselReceiptsHdrUid int = 762;
DECLARE @ContainerBuildingUid int = 900;

;WITH s AS (
    SELECT po_line_uid, qty = SUM(CONVERT(decimal(19,9), Invoiced_Qty))
    FROM P21Import.dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_pallet_line
    WHERE shipment_file_id = @ShipmentFileId
      AND po_line_uid IS NOT NULL
      AND Invoiced_Qty IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY po_line_uid
), expected AS (
    SELECT line_count = COUNT(*), total_qty = SUM(qty)
    FROM s
), vlinks AS (
    SELECT link_rows = COUNT(*), link_qty = COALESCE(SUM(CONVERT(decimal(19,9), quantity_on_po)),0)
    FROM dbo.oe_line_po
    WHERE po_no = @VesselReceiptsHdrUid
      AND connection_type = 'V'
      AND ISNULL(delete_flag,'N') = 'N'
      AND ISNULL(cancel_flag,'N') = 'N'
), open_vlinks AS (
    SELECT open_link_rows = COUNT(*), open_link_qty = COALESCE(SUM(CONVERT(decimal(19,9), quantity_on_po)),0)
    FROM dbo.oe_line_po
    WHERE po_no = @VesselReceiptsHdrUid
      AND connection_type = 'V'
      AND ISNULL(delete_flag,'N') = 'N'
      AND ISNULL(cancel_flag,'N') = 'N'
      AND ISNULL(completed,'N') = 'N'
), old_plinks AS (
    SELECT open_original_po_link_rows = COUNT(*), open_original_po_link_qty = COALESCE(SUM(CONVERT(decimal(19,9), quantity_on_po)),0)
    FROM dbo.oe_line_po AS olp
    INNER JOIN dbo.po_line AS pol
      ON pol.po_no = olp.po_no
     AND pol.line_no = olp.po_line_number
    INNER JOIN s
      ON s.po_line_uid = pol.po_line_uid
    WHERE olp.connection_type = 'P'
      AND ISNULL(olp.delete_flag,'N') = 'N'
      AND ISNULL(olp.cancel_flag,'N') = 'N'
      AND ISNULL(olp.completed,'N') = 'N'
)
SELECT result_set='summary',
       expected_lines = e.line_count,
       expected_qty = e.total_qty,
       cbp_rows = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.container_building_po WHERE container_building_uid=@ContainerBuildingUid),
       vrl_rows = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.vessel_receipts_line WHERE vessel_receipts_hdr_uid=@VesselReceiptsHdrUid),
       vrl_qty = (SELECT SUM(CONVERT(decimal(19,9), container_qty_received)) FROM dbo.vessel_receipts_line WHERE vessel_receipts_hdr_uid=@VesselReceiptsHdrUid),
       crl_rows = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dbo.container_receipts_line WHERE container_receipts_hdr_uid=@ContainerReceiptsHdrUid),
       crl_qty = (SELECT SUM(CONVERT(decimal(19,9), qty_received)) FROM dbo.container_receipts_line WHERE container_receipts_hdr_uid=@ContainerReceiptsHdrUid),
       vlink_rows = v.link_rows,
       vlink_qty = v.link_qty,
       open_vlink_rows = ov.open_link_rows,
       open_vlink_qty = ov.open_link_qty,
       open_original_po_link_rows = op.open_original_po_link_rows,
       open_original_po_link_qty = op.open_original_po_link_qty
FROM expected e CROSS JOIN vlinks v CROSS JOIN open_vlinks ov CROSS JOIN old_plinks op;

SELECT TOP (20) result_set='vessel_link_sample', order_number, line_number, po_no, po_line_number, quantity_on_po, completed, connection_type
FROM dbo.oe_line_po
WHERE po_no = @VesselReceiptsHdrUid
  AND connection_type = 'V'
ORDER BY po_line_number, order_number, line_number;
